Row.Text: Adds an AI Advisor button to the sub-system dock that opens an advisor panel with live game information.
Greetings, leader. Your council has reviewed the state of the empire.

At the dawn of each Age, dedicate yourself to 3 Triumphs. Complete a Triumph to bank its Legacy Points and unlock its Dedication for the next Age. Your council will track each goal and tell you whether you are on pace — and exactly what to build or do to get there.

Test of Time has four Victory Conditions, each decided in the Modern Age by having the greatest of a single measure: Dominion (Military), Tourism (Cultural), GDP (Economic), and Innovation (Scientific). Build your lead now by completing this Age's Triumphs. Below is how each victory is won, your standing, and whether you are leading.
No victory conditions are available right now.
Advice updates each turn based on the state of your empire.
